languages.text: {n}Дунавски хмурится, заставляя камень в глазнице чуть сместиться.{/n} "Я думала, что в Империуме царят иные порядки. А здесь, выходит, как на Заркове. Что ж... Зато мы привычные".

{n}Dunawski frowns, causing the stone in her eye socket to shift slightly.{/n} "I thought things would be handled differently in the Imperium. But here, it seems, it's just like back on Zarkov. Well... at least we're used to it."
languages.original_text: {n}Дунавски хмурится, заставляя камень в глазнице чуть сместиться.{/n} "Я думала, что в Империуме царят иные порядки. А здесь, выходит, как на Заркове. Что ж... Зато мы привычные".

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski frowns, causing the stone in her eye socket to shift slightly.{/n} "I thought things were handled differently in the Imperium. But here, it seems, it's just like back on Zarkov. Well... at least we're used to it."

{n}Dunawski frowns, causing the stone in her eye socket to shift slightly.{/n} "I thought things would be handled differently in the Imperium. But here, it seems, it's just like back on Zarkov. Well... at least we're used to it."
"Those are harsh words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But... also fair? Not that things were very different on Zarkov. It's just that I had hoped the Imperium would be governed by different rules."

{n}Dunawski frowns, causing the stone in her eye socket to shift slightly.{/n} "I thought things were handled differently in the Imperium. But here, it seems, it's just like back on Zarkov. Well... at least we're used to it."

{n}Dunawski frowns, causing the stone in her eye socket to shift slightly.{/n} "I thought things would be handled differently in the Imperium. But here, it seems, it's just like back on Zarkov. Well... at least we're used to it."

languages.text: 「それは厳しい言葉ですね、御{mf|裁判長|裁判長}。でも…公平でもあるかもしれません。ザルコフでは状況はあまり違っていませんでした。ただ、帝国は異なるルールで運営されることを期待していました」
languages.original_text: "Those are harsh words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But... also fair? Not that things were very different on Zarkov. It's just that I had hoped the Imperium would be governed by different rules."

languages.text: {n}Dunawski kaşlarını çatıyor, bu da göz çukurundaki taşın hafifçe oynamasına neden oluyor.{/n} "İmparatorluk'ta işlerin farklı yürüdüğünü sanıyordum. Ancak görünüşe göre burada da Zarkov'daki gibi. Neyse... En azından bu duruma alışkınız."
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski frowns, causing the stone in her eye socket to shift slightly.{/n} "I thought things would be handled differently in the Imperium. But here, it seems, it's just like back on Zarkov. Well... at least we're used to it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski kaşlarını çatıyor, bu da göz çukurundaki taşın hafifçe oynamasına neden oluyor.{/n} "İmparatorluk'ta işlerin farklı yürüdüğünü sanıyordum. Ancak görünüşe göre burada da Zarkov'daki gibi. Neyse... En azından bu duruma alışkınız."

languages.text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡皱起眉头，眼窝中的那枚石头微微一颤。{/n}“我原以为帝国会有所不同。但看起来，跟扎尔科夫并无二致……好吧，至少我们早就习惯了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski frowns, causing the stone in her eye socket to shift slightly.{/n} "I thought things would be handled differently in the Imperium. But here, it seems, it's just like back on Zarkov. Well... at least we're used to it."

traits.locale_text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡皱起眉头，眼窝中的那枚石头微微一颤。{/n}“我原以为帝国会有所不同。但看起来，跟扎尔科夫并无二致……好吧，至少我们早就习惯了。”

languages.text: {n}Dunawski runzelt die Stirn, wodurch sich der Stein in ihrer Augenhöhle ein wenig bewegt.{/n} "Ich dachte, im Imperium würden die Dinge anders gehandhabt. Aber hier scheint alles wie auf Zarkov zu sein. Tja ... daran sind wir immerhin gewöhnt."
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski frowns, causing the stone in her eye socket to shift slightly.{/n} "I thought things would be handled differently in the Imperium. But here, it seems, it's just like back on Zarkov. Well... at least we're used to it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski runzelt die Stirn, wodurch sich der Stein in ihrer Augenhöhle ein wenig bewegt.{/n} "Ich dachte, im Imperium würden die Dinge anders gehandhabt. Aber hier scheint alles wie auf Zarkov zu sein. Tja ... daran sind wir immerhin gewöhnt."

languages.text: {n}Dunawski fronce les sourcils, et la pierre dans son orbite bouge légèrement.{/n} « Je croyais que les choses seraient différentes dans l'Imperium. Au final, c'est comme chez nous. Au moins... nous y sommes habitués. »
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski frowns, causing the stone in her eye socket to shift slightly.{/n} "I thought things would be handled differently in the Imperium. But here, it seems, it's just like back on Zarkov. Well... at least we're used to it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski fronce les sourcils, et la pierre dans son orbite bouge légèrement.{/n} « Je croyais que les choses seraient différentes dans l'Imperium. Au final, c'est comme chez nous. Au moins... nous y sommes habitués. »

languages.text: {n}Dunawski frunce el ceño, haciendo que la piedra en la cuenca de su ojo se mueva ligeramente.{/n} «Pensé que las cosas se harían de otra forma en el Imperium, pero parece que aquí todo funciona igual que en Zarkov. Bueno... al menos estamos acostumbrados».
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski frowns, causing the stone in her eye socket to shift slightly.{/n} "I thought things would be handled differently in the Imperium. But here, it seems, it's just like back on Zarkov. Well... at least we're used to it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski frunce el ceño, haciendo que la piedra en la cuenca de su ojo se mueva ligeramente.{/n} «Pensé que las cosas se harían de otra forma en el Imperium, pero parece que aquí todo funciona igual que en Zarkov. Bueno... al menos estamos acostumbrados».
